versions.verifyHtml:
kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   gitlab-9-8-4                    true
versions.deployHtml:
In AWS tested on worker instanceType: t3.2xlarge and rootVolumeSize: 32: 

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: ClusterDeployment
metadata:
  name: aws-example
spec:
  template: aws-standalone-cp-1-0-20
  credential: aws-credential
  config:
    worker:
      instanceType: t3.2xlarge
      rootVolumeSize: 32
    workersNumber: 1
    ...

In Azure tested on 3 workers vmSize: Standard_A2_v2: ~~~yaml apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1 kind: ClusterDeployment metadata: name: azure-example spec: template: azure-standalone-cp-1-0-20 credential: azure-credential config: worker: vmSize: Standard_A2_v2 workersNumber: 3 ... 

Tested service configuration:
yaml apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1 kind: MultiClusterService ... serviceSpec: services: - template: gitlab-9-8-4 name: gitlab namespace: gitlab values: | gitlab: global: edition: ce kas: enabled: false minio: enabled: true certmanager-issuer: email: admin@example.com gitlab-runner: install: false registry: enabled: false prometheus: install: false nginx-ingress: controller: replicaCount: 1 ~~~
